upstream.name: Code OSS
upstream.selectionReason: Initial Smith MVP-0 baseline pinned from the public Code OSS main branch so downstream build, provenance, inventory, and evidence controls have a concrete source reference.

updatePolicy.cadence: monthly routine candidate, urgent security candidate when required
updatePolicy.routineBudget: five engineer-days or less for a routine monthly Code OSS update
updatePolicy.versionMatching: Smith client and Smith remote agent artifacts must record the same upstream commit and Smith release version.
